description: All sub-audits have 0 Zero Tolerance issues — only High risk issues present. Tests explicit zero-value reporting for ztIssues in the Sub-Audit Risk Concentration paragraph.

Very small dataset: totalIssues <= 15, totalUniquePIs <= 5, fewer than 5 PIs in topPIs and fewer than 3 sub-audits. Tests minItems edge cases and small-count narration.

Large dataset: totalIssues >= 1000, issues spread evenly across top PIs (low concentration, top5ConcentrationPercent < 20%). Tests narration of low concentration scenarios.
